title: pollinia mollis
intro: Pollinia mollis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. This plant is also known as soft milkweed or soft Mexican milkweed, and it is native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Pollinia mollis include its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which may help to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
